cases.description: Uses the shell tool to inspect the working directory and returns the requested marker.
cases.prompt: Use the shell tool exactly once to run `pwd`. Then answer with one line that begins with `WORKDIR=`.

cases.description: Uses the shell tool for a fast repo inspection command and returns the requested marker.
cases.prompt: Use the shell tool exactly once to run `find . -maxdepth 1 -type f | wc -l`. Then answer with one line that begins with `FILE_COUNT=`.
